prose: **Phenol Fukui Reactivity Analysis** — computed reactivity indices at the DFT level, **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** (PySCF, tier `standard` with density fitting), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry was user-specified and unoptimized (taken as-is from the file `phenol.xyz`). f⁺ (electrophilic attack susceptibility): max on atom 3 (C, f⁺ = 2.1028319), f⁻ (nucleophilic attack susceptibility): max on atom 1 (O, f⁻ = 0.16201477). Command run: `cli.py fukui /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/phenol.xyz --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --solvent none --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 --verbose 4`.
